title: Argentinian Chia Seed Cereal
description: A simple and nutritious Argentinian-inspired breakfast cereal made with chia seeds and gooey toppings.
instructions: 1. In a bowl, mix together chia seeds and honey (or maple syrup).
2. Add in soaked gooseberries and stir to combine.
3. If using, stir in goeey nut butter.
4. Cover the bowl with a plate and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
5. Heat a skillet with fry oil over medium heat.
6. Fry the gooseberries until caramelized, about 5 minutes.
7. Serve the chia seed mixture with the fried gooseberries on top.
